title: Activate all available inactive skills by creating symlinks in skills/active
job:
Activate all available-but-inactive skills by creating symlinks in skills/active/. 

For each skill in the skills/ directory that is NOT already in skills/active/, create a symlink:
```bash
ln -s ../skill-name skills/active/skill-name
```

Skills to activate (from the available list):
- amazon-shopping
- apify-ultimate-scraper
- brave-search
- clickup-pm
- content-repurposer
- de-ai-fy
- excalidraw-architect
- fathom
- google-workspace (or google-workspace v2)
- instantly
- invoice-extractor
- kie-ai
- meeting-notes
- meeting-prep
- metricool
- neon
- notion
- obsidian-master
- plan-architect
- proactive-agent
- retell-voice-agent-creator
- scrapling
- skills-architect
- solution-offer-builder
- task-master
- teable
- thumbnail-generator
- trends-scraper
- vapi
- waterfall-enrichment
- web-search-plus
- website-builder
- youtube
- youtube-transcript

Use bash to check skills/ directory, verify each skill exists and isn't already symlinked, then create all the symlinks in skills/active/. Skip any that don't exist or are already active.

After activating, list the contents of skills/active/ to confirm all symlinks were created successfully.
